en: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by the will of God, and Timothy our brother,
zh: 奉 神旨意作基督耶穌使徒的保羅，和提摩太弟兄，

en: To the saints and faithful brothers in Christ at Colossae: Grace to you and peace from God our Father.
zh: 寫信給在歌羅西的聖徒，和在基督裡忠心的弟兄。願恩惠平安從我們的父 神臨到你們。

en: We always thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, when we pray for you,
zh: 我們為你們祈禱的時候，常常感謝 神我們主耶穌基督的父，

en: since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and of the love that you have for all the saints,
zh: 因為聽見你們在基督耶穌裡的信心，和對眾聖徒的愛心。

en: because of the hope laid up for you in heaven. Of this you have heard before in the word of the truth, the gospel,
zh: 這都是由於那給你們存在天上的盼望，這盼望是你們從前在福音真理的道上聽過的。

en: which has come to you, as indeed in the whole world it is bearing fruit and growing- as it also does among you, since the day you heard it and understood the grace of God in truth,
zh: 這福音傳到你們那裡，也傳到全世界；你們聽了福音，因著真理確實認識了 神的恩典之後，這福音就在你們中間不斷地結果和增長，在全世界也是一樣。

en: just as you learned it from Epaphras our beloved fellow servant. He is a faithful minister of Christ on your behalf
zh: 這福音也就是你們從我們親愛的、一同作僕人 的以巴弗那裡學到的。他為你們作了基督忠心的僕役，

en: and has made known to us your love in the Spirit.
zh: 也把你們在聖靈裡的愛心告訴了我們。

en: And so, from the day we heard, we have not ceased to pray for you, asking that you may be filled with the knowledge of his will in all spiritual wisdom and understanding,
zh: 因此，我們從聽見的那天起，就不停地為你們禱告祈求，願你們藉著一切屬靈的智慧和悟性，可以充分明白 神的旨意，

en: so as to walk in a manner worthy of the Lord, fully pleasing to him, bearing fruit in every good work and increasing in the knowledge of God.
zh: 使你們行事為人對得起主，凡事蒙他喜悅；在一切善事上多結果子，更加認識 神；

en: May you be strengthened with all power, according to his glorious might, for all endurance and patience with joy,
zh: 依照他榮耀的大能得著一切能力，帶著喜樂的心，凡事忍耐寬容；

en: giving thanks to the Father, who has qualified you to share in the inheritance of the saints in light.
zh: 並且感謝父，他使你們有資格分享聖徒在光明中的基業。

en: He has delivered us from the domain of darkness and transferred us to the kingdom of his beloved Son,
zh: 他救我們脫離了黑暗的權勢，把我們遷入他愛子的國裡。

en: in whom we have redemption, the forgiveness of sins.
zh: 我們在愛子裡蒙了救贖，罪得赦免。

en: He is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of all creation.
zh: 這愛子是那看不見的 神的形象，是首先的，在一切被造的之上。

en: For by him all things were created, in heaven and on earth, visible and invisible, whether thrones or dominions or rulers or authorities- all things were created through him and for him.
zh: 因為天上地上的萬有：看得見的和看不見的，無論是坐王位的，或是作主的，或是執政的，或是掌權的，都是本著他造的；萬有都是藉著他，又是為著他而造的。

en: And he is before all things, and in him all things hold together.
zh: 他在萬有之先；萬有也一同靠著他而存在。

en: And he is the head of the body, the church. He is the beginning, the firstborn from the dead, that in everything he might be preeminent.
zh: 他是身體的頭，這身體就是教會。他是元始，是死人中首先復生的，好讓他在凡事上居首位；

en: For in him all the fullness of God was pleased to dwell,
zh: 因為 神樂意使所有的豐盛都住在愛子裡面，

en: and through him to reconcile to himself all things, whether on earth or in heaven, making peace by the blood of his cross.
zh: 並且藉著他在十字架上所流的血成就了和平，使萬有，無論是地上天上的，都藉著他與 神和好了。

en: And you, who once were alienated and hostile in mind, doing evil deeds,
zh: 雖然你們從前也是和 神隔絕，心思上與他為敵，行為邪惡，

en: he has now reconciled in his body of flesh by his death, in order to present you holy and blameless and above reproach before him,
zh: 但現今 神在愛子的肉身上，藉著他的死，使你們與 神和好了，為了要把你們這些聖潔、無瑕疵、無可指摘的人，呈獻在他面前。

en: if indeed you continue in the faith, stable and steadfast, not shifting from the hope of the gospel that you heard, which has been proclaimed in all creation under heaven, and of which I, Paul, became a minister.
zh: 只是你們要常存信心，根基穩固，不受動搖偏離福音的盼望。這福音你們聽過了，也傳給了天下萬民；我保羅也作了這福音的僕役。

en: Now I rejoice in my sufferings for your sake, and in my flesh I am filling up what is lacking in Christ's afflictions for the sake of his body, that is, the church,
zh: 現在我為你們受苦，我覺得喜樂；為了基督的身體，就是為了教會，我要在自己的肉身上，補滿基督苦難的不足。

en: of which I became a minister according to the stewardship from God that was given to me for you, to make the word of God fully known,
zh: 我照著 神為你們而賜給我的管家職分，作了教會的僕役，要把 神的道，就是歷世歷代隱藏的奧祕，傳得完備。現在這奧祕已經向他的眾聖徒顯明了。

en: the mystery hidden for ages and generations but now revealed to his saints.
To them God chose to make known how great among the Gentiles are the riches of the glory of this mystery, which is Christ in you, the hope of glory.
zh: 神願意使他們知道這奧祕在外族人中有多麼榮耀的豐盛，這奧祕就是基督在你們裡面成了榮耀的盼望。

en: Him we proclaim, warning everyone and teaching everyone with all wisdom, that we may present everyone mature in Christ.
zh: 我們傳揚他，是用各樣的智慧，勸戒各人，教導各人，為了要使各人在基督裡得到完全。

en: For this I toil, struggling with all his energy that he powerfully works within me.
zh: 我也為了這事勞苦，按著他用大能在我心中運行的動力，竭力奮鬥。
